item.name: Oracular Crab
item.description:
While bloodpolish crabs are certainly frightening, this larger and more violent relative is nothing less than a nightmare come to life.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: A particularly large variant of the bloodpolish crab said to appear with the spectral current. Its habit of cramming the shredded pieces of prey into a chosen hollow has been interpreted by some as a ritual offering to the all-seeing spirits of the deep.
